title: Assistant Store Manager - Cafe Coffee Day - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Cafe Coffee Day - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
